data.body: Substrate landed (commit 232b01c9). New rebar._logging module (convention reference docstring + idempotent install_stderr_handler honouring REBAR_LOG_LEVEL, stderr-only). NullHandler on rebar root (__init__.py) and sibling rebar_reconciler root. Stderr StreamHandler installed in all three entrypoint mains (CLI, MCP, reconciler subprocess). stdout-purity contract test added (list --full parses as JSON; forced diagnostic to stderr, stdout stays pure JSON). No except body changed. Full suite: 3201 passed/12 skipped; ruff clean.
